title: [EROBEAT] Accelerando - 01-04 [x264]
description:
[![Image](http://sadpanda.us/images/146807-A755GJ7.jpg)](http://erobeat.hafio.net/home)  
  
This is the official thread for Erobeat fansub downloads.   
All series in this thread are unlicensed and subtitled in English.  
For any of our releases not listed in this thread, please visit [erobeat](http://erobeat.hafio.net) for more downloads.  
  
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------  
  
**Playback Help**  
  
All files are encoded in x264 format. If you are unable to play our files, please make sure you have the correct codecs installed. You can grab a codec pack like [CCCP](http://www.cccp-project.net) or [K-Lite](http://www.codecguide.com/download_kl.htm). Alternatively, you can use the [VideoLAN](http://www.videolan.org) player, but quality will suffer.  
  
All the files in this thread are 100% compatible with Xbox 360 and Playstation 3.  
![Image](http://sadpanda.us/images/146808-VSI4FFZ.jpg)  
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------  
  
**Important**  
  
In order for Erobeat to continue to bring you subtitled anime, we rely on revenue from direct downloads to help pay the translator. Please try to download our releases using this thread or our official homepage whenever possible. Without your support, we won't be able continue.  
  
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------  
  
**Accelerando**  
  
![Image](http://sadpanda.us/images/363276-DJ7LUWV.jpg)  
**Full Title:** Accelerando ~Datenshi-tachi no Sasayaki~  
**Unofficial Title:** Accelerando ~Whisper of the Fallen Angels~  
**Japanese Title:** アッチェレランド ～堕天使たちの囁き～  
**Label:** Pink Pineapple  
**Number of Episodes:** 4  
**Filesize:** 233MB  
  
**Description:**  
Waitress Tamaki has sex with her playmate Kurono at the café she works for. Ignorant of their relationship, their common friend, Ohashi, visits the café as usual to see Tamaki whom he secretly loves. However, Kurono notices Ohashi’s feelings. In order to incite him into confessing his feelings to her, Kurono molests Tamaki and makes her wait on him as she is. As she was sexually excited, she gives off a female's scent, which, in turn, excites Ohashi. Meanwhile, Tomoe, a friend of Kurono’s appears… Will Ohashi be able to confess his love to Tamaki?

The ladies who take advantage of this convenience find that blouses and skirts aren't the only things that get wrung out by the eager employee on call. Every pickup and drop off seems to lead to a nooner that easily satisfies both customer and clerk alike. But can our intrepid launderer make a clean getaway after every dirty deed?

This is the official thread for Erobeat fansub downloads.   
All series in this thread are unlicensed and subtitled in English.  
For any of our releases not listed in this thread, please visit [erobeat](http://erobeat.hafio.net) for more downloads.  
  
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------  
  
**Playback Help**  
  
All files are encoded in x264 format. If you are unable to play our files, please make sure you have the correct codecs installed. You can grab a codec pack like [CCCP](http://www.cccp-project.net) or [K-Lite](http://www.codecguide.com/download_kl.htm). Alternatively, you can use the [VideoLAN](http://www.videolan.org) player, but quality will suffer.  
  
All the files in this thread are 100% compatible with Xbox 360 and Playstation 3.  
![Image](http://sadpanda.us/images/146808-VSI4FFZ.jpg)  
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------  
  
**Important**  
  
In order for Erobeat to continue to bring you subtitled anime, we rely on revenue from direct downloads to help pay the translator. Please try to download our releases using this thread or our official homepage whenever possible. Without your support, we won't be able continue.

title: Magical Twilight Vol.1-3 (DVD 640x480 x264 AAC)
description:
![Image](http://media.animevice.com/uploads/0/3695/263218-43a23394927c_large.jpg)  
  
Sexy apprentice-witch Chipple dreams of becoming a good witch, but in order to achieve her goal, she first has to pass the Offi cial Licensing Test! After bombing the written portion of the test for the third time in a row, Chipple only has one option left: ace the practical. So it’s off to the mortal world to meet up with her test subject, one Tsukasa Tachibana, and make a “good impression” on him.  
  
Sounds pretty easy, right? Not when it means teaming up with the one person Chipple really hates: Irene, a sultry siren who only passed the written part by using an unauthorized “oral exam” and a healthy dose of blackmail. Suffice it to say that the roof of the test subject’s house isn’t the only thing that’s going to get blown when these seductive sorceresses vie against each other to be the first to pass their test!  
  
Format: MKV  
Censored: No

Resolution: 640 x 480

This is the official thread for Erobeat fansub downloads.   
All series in this thread are unlicensed and subtitled in English.  
For any of our releases not listed in this thread, please visit [erobeat](http://erobeat.hafio.net) for more downloads.  
  
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------  
  
**Playback Help**  
  
All files are encoded in x264 format. If you are unable to play our files, please make sure you have the correct codecs installed. You can grab a codec pack like [CCCP](http://www.cccp-project.net) or [K-Lite](http://www.codecguide.com/download_kl.htm). Alternatively, you can use the [VideoLAN](http://www.videolan.org) player, but quality will suffer.  
  
All the files in this thread are 100% compatible with Xbox 360 and Playstation 3.  
![Image](http://sadpanda.us/images/146808-VSI4FFZ.jpg)  
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------  
  
**Important**  
  
In order for Erobeat to continue to bring you subtitled anime, we rely on revenue from direct downloads to help pay the translator. Please try to download our releases using this thread or our official homepage whenever possible. Without your support, we won't be able continue.
